name: Joan Mateo Duarte Politi
positioning: I build products where AI, systems, and interface design meet.
story: I'm from Rosario, Argentina. I've been obsessed with solving problems since I was a kid. Math olympiads, not because anyone pushed me, but because I loved the challenge. The solution is never the hard part. The approach is everything.

At 21 I dropped out of university to start a Bitcoin mining company. It worked. We scaled fast, and that itch to build never went away. So I taught myself to code because I refused to keep delegating the most important part of building a company.

chess.text: Just getting started on my chess journey. Still blundering queens and hanging pieces, but every loss is a lesson. The beauty of chess is that the board never lies. It rewards patience, pattern recognition, and thinking two moves ahead. I'm hooked.

reading.text: I read a lot. Strategy, psychology, history, fiction. Anything that changes how I think about the world. A few favorites:
